detect-changes.note: Changed-path detection is CI workflow orchestration; local preflight uses the source-controlled manifest instead of this GitHub job.

lint.note: ruff lint/format are included in scripts/pre-push-tests.sh

type-check.note: mypy is required in scripts/pre-push-tests.sh; CI type-check runs on push code changes plus weekly/manual heavy verification, not on PRs.

security.note: bandit is included in scripts/pre-push-tests.sh; CI bandit runs on push code changes plus weekly/manual heavy verification, not on PRs.

semgrep.note: semgrep runs only in heavy CI mode (manual/nightly).

secret-scan.note: gitleaks diff scan runs in PR CI; full-history scan runs weekly/manual.

dependency-audit.note: pip-audit is required in scripts/pre-push-tests.sh and runs in heavy CI mode weekly/manual.

license-check.note: pip-licenses allowlist check is in scripts/pre-push-tests.sh

pre-commit.note: pre-commit is covered by stricter canonical local pipeline checks

docs-contract.note: docs-contract runs on push docs changes plus weekly/manual verification; PRs rely on local docs bundle checks instead of a GitHub docs job.

pipeline-contract.note: contract validation runs locally via scripts/check_pipeline_contract.py

risk-classifier.note: risk classifier is CI policy logic that decides whether local required-E2E receipt evidence is mandatory.

required-e2e-gate.note: CI validates local required-E2E receipt contract; generate .ci/e2e-receipt.json via scripts/local-required-e2e-receipt.sh.

zetherion-boundary-check.note: Top-level cgs/** is blocked in local pre-push and CI boundary checks.

unit-test.note: unit tests with coverage >=90% are required locally; CI unit tests run on push code changes plus weekly/manual heavy verification, not on PRs.

integration-test.note: integration suites run in canonical local pipeline and heavy CI mode (weekly/manual).

docker-build-test.note: Docker build validation is covered by the canonical local pipeline when it rebuilds the containerized test harness before required E2E.
